passwordFeedback.a_word_is_easy: A word by itself is easy to guess
passwordFeedback.all_uppercase_doesnt_help: All-uppercase is almost as easy to guess as all-lowercase
passwordFeedback.avoid_associated_dates_and_years: Avoid dates and years that are associated with you
passwordFeedback.avoid_associated_years: Avoid years that are associated with you
passwordFeedback.common_names_are_easy: Common names and surnames are easy to guess
passwordFeedback.dates_are_easy: Dates are often easy to guess
passwordFeedback.names_are_easy: Names and surnames by themselves are easy to guess
passwordFeedback.no_need_for_mixed_chars: No need for symbols, digits, or uppercase letters
passwordFeedback.recent_years_are_easy: Recent years are easy to guess
passwordFeedback.repeated_chars_are_easy: Repeats like "aaa" are easy to guess
passwordFeedback.repeated_patterns_are_easy: Repeats like "abcabcabc" are only slightly harder to guess than "abc"
passwordFeedback.reverse_doesnt_help: Reversed words aren't much harder to guess
passwordFeedback.sequences_are_easy: Sequences like abc or 6543 are easy to guess
passwordFeedback.short_keyboard_patterns_are_easy: Short keyboard patterns are easy to guess
passwordFeedback.similar_to_common_password: This is similar to a commonly used password
passwordFeedback.straight_rows_of_keys_are_easy: Straight rows of keys are easy to guess
passwordFeedback.substitution_doesnt_help: Predictable substitutions like '@' instead of 'a' don't help very much
passwordFeedback.top100_common_password: This is a top-100 common password
passwordFeedback.top10_common_password: This is a top-10 common password
passwordFeedback.uncommon_words_are_better: Add another word or two. Uncommon words are better.
passwordFeedback.use_a_few_words: Use a few words, avoid common phrases
passwordFeedback.use_longer_keyboard_patterns: Use a longer keyboard pattern with more turns
passwordFeedback.very_common_password: This is a very common password
